ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor teaching the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Number of credit hours for the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for the course (e.g., course IDs or descriptions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the instructor */,
  "office_hours" TEXT /* Office hours of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the topic belongs to */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the topic */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the topic in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lectures" (
  "lecture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lecture */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic the lecture belongs to */,
  "lecture_name" TEXT /* Name of the lecture */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the lecture was delivered */,
  "materials" TEXT /* Link to lecture materials (e.g., slides, videos) */,
  "attended_students" INTEGER /* Number of students who attended the lecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lecture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lectures_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "assignment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the assignment */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points for the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Current grade of the student in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment the submission belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the assignment was submitted */,
  "file" TEXT /* Link to the submitted file */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade received for the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the project belongs to */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task (e.g., 'To-Do', 'In Progress', 'Done') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_tasks_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_task_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being assigned */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student being assigned the task */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the task was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the task assignment (e.g., 'To-Do', 'In Progress', 'Done') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_task_assignments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_task_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES project_tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the post belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who created the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was created */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
